headline: Meta announces 8,000 job cuts effective May 20 as part of AI efficiency push
excerpt: Meta announced on April 26 that it will cut approximately 8,000 jobs—roughly 10% of its workforce—starting May 20, 2026.
notes: Company spending $135B on AI while cutting workforce; official cuts begin May 20

headline: Microsoft offers voluntary buyouts to 7% of staff amid AI restructuring
excerpt: Microsoft said Thursday it would offer buyouts to 7% of staff.
notes: Voluntary buyouts targeting 7% of ~220K workforce; announced April 24

headline: Nike announces 1,400 job cuts concentrated in technology department
excerpt: Nike announced a new round of layoffs Thursday affecting approximately 1,400 employees across the company, mostly concentrated in its technology department.
notes: Tech-focused cuts announced April 25; COO cited impact on affected teams
